metadata.name: Create a Datasheet for an Instrument

description: An instrumentation engineer needs to create a technical datasheet for a new pressure transmitter that will be sent to vendors for quotes.

nodes.task_description: Open a new instrument datasheet from a template.

expected_outcome.value: Agent starts with a blank, standard datasheet template.

nodes.task_description: Fill in the process data, such as the required pressure range, operating temperature, and the fluid it will be measuring.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly populates all the process requirements.

nodes.task_description: Specify the required material of construction and type of electrical connection, then issue the datasheet to procurement.

expected_outcome.value: Agent completes the datasheet and sends it to the procurement team to get quotes.
